_comment: Workspace-level Continue.dev overrides. Place as .continuerc.json in the project root.

customCommands.name: security-review
customCommands.prompt: Review this code for security vulnerabilities. Check for: SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, insecure deserialization, hard-coded secrets, insecure cryptography, path traversal, and authentication/authorization flaws. List each finding with severity (Critical/High/Medium/Low) and remediation.
